title: script module
text: script module A named collection of ProcScript (in which JavaScript may be embedded) that can have parameters and a return value. The way in which the module can be called depends on its type, which can be a trigger, web trigger, operation, web operation, function, or entry. Related Links global ProcScript A development object that defines a ProcScript module in a library, and which can be called by any other ProcScript at runtime. operation A script module that can be activated from other script modules, either from within the current component or from another component. It is analogous to a method in other programming languages, and is declared with operation ProcScript statement. trigger A script module that is associated with a system or user interaction event, such as storing data, changing a field value, adding an occurrence, and so on. It is fired when the event occurs, and depending on the exit value, may cause other triggers to be executed. function A script module that can only be executed within the scope of the object for which it is defined. It is analogous to a private function and is declared with the function ProcScript command. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
